reentry.exception: Medical emergency only, with staff escort. Your ticket will not re-scan after exit.
reentry.text: Re-entry is not permitted once you exit MetLife Stadium. Please plan your visits to concession areas before leaving your seat area. For medical emergencies requiring exit and re-entry, speak to a supervisor at the gate.

bags.text: Clear bags only, maximum 12x6x12 inches. One small clutch purse (4.5x6.5 inches) is also permitted. No backpacks. Checked bag storage available at Gate A Fan Services Booth.

items: Professional cameras with detachable lenses over 6 inches
prohibited_items.text: Prohibited items include: backpacks, outside food/drink, large umbrellas, selfie sticks, laser pointers, air horns, any weapons, and drones. Full list available at stadium entrances.

medical.text: If you witness or experience a medical emergency: alert the nearest staff member immediately, or go to the nearest First Aid station at Gate A (Room NA-1) or Gate C (Station EC-1). AED defibrillators are at Sections 101, 108, and 118. For emergencies: call 911 or the stadium line 1-800-STADIUM.
stations: Gate A – First Aid Room NA-1

lost_child.text: If you have lost a child or found an unaccompanied child: immediately tell the nearest staff member and say 'Code Adam'. Fan Services Booth FS-1 (Gate A) coordinates all lost child responses. Security will make a PA announcement within 2 minutes. Do not leave the child alone.

lost_property.text: Report lost property to Fan Services Booths at Gate A (FS-1) or East Concourse (FS-2). Found items are logged and held for 30 days. Contact: lostandfound@metlifeevents.com

smoking.text: Smoking and vaping are not permitted inside the stadium. Designated smoking area is outside Gate F on the south-west exterior.

wifi.text: Free WiFi is available throughout MetLife Stadium. Network: MetLife-Event-Guest — no password required.

faqs.question: What time do gates open?
faqs.answer: Gates open 2.5 hours before kickoff — today at 17:30 ET.

faqs.question: Where is the team merchandise store?
faqs.answer: The official FIFA merchandise shop is at East Plaza (before Gate C) and on Level 2 of the North concourse.

faqs.question: Are there ATMs inside?
faqs.answer: Yes. ATMs are located at the Gate A concourse, East concourse (near Gate C), and South concourse (near Gate E).

faqs.question: Is food available inside?
faqs.answer: Yes. Concession stands are on all concourses. Vegetarian, vegan, and halal options are available. No outside food or drink is permitted (medical exceptions available at Fan Services).
